rxn_class_summary: Electrochemical tandem trifluoromethylation (or sulfonylation)/semipinacol rearrangement of cyclobutanol-substituted allylic alcohols to give α-quaternary β-CF3 (or β-sulfonyl) cyclopentanones via 1,2-alkyl migration.
electrochemical_role: Anodic single-electron oxidation of CF3SO2Na (Langlois reagent) generates CF3SO2 radical that extrudes SO2 to give CF3 radical; after CF3 addition to the alkene, the resulting benzyl radical is further anodically oxidized to a benzyl carbocation that triggers ring expansion. Cathode reduces H2O/H+ to H2.

key_intermediates.name: CF3SO2 radical (sulfonyl radical from anodic SET of Langlois reagent)
Benzylic carbon radical 5 (CF3 addition adduct to styrenyl cyclobutanol)
Ring-expanded oxocarbenium / protonated cyclopentanone after 1,2-alkyl migration

electron_flow: Anode oxidizes CF3SO2- to CF3SO2 radical which loses SO2 to give CF3 radical; CF3 radical adds to the styrenyl C=C of the allylic cyclobutanol giving a benzyl radical, which is oxidized again at the anode to a benzyl cation; 1,2-alkyl (cyclobutyl C-C) migration with deprotonation furnishes the α-quaternary cyclopentanone, while the cathode reduces water to H2.

probe_reagents.name: TEMPO
probe_reagents.observation: Reaction inhibited; no 2a formed; TEMPO-CF3 adduct detected by GC-MS, supporting a free CF3 radical.

probe_reagents.name: Methanol (as cosolvent)
probe_reagents.observation: Methanol-trapped (methoxy-incorporated) species observed, indicating a carbocation intermediate.

probe_reagents.name: CF3SO2Na / 1a cyclic voltammetry
probe_reagents.observation: 1a oxidizes at Ep/2 = 2.1 V vs SCE while CF3SO2Na oxidizes at 1.4 V vs SCE, so CF3SO2Na is preferentially oxidized first, generating CF3 radical.

notes: Selectivity for 1,2-migration over oxygen-trapping or deprotonation byproducts (4aa/4ab) relies on the high migratory aptitude of the cyclobutyl group. Competing arene trifluoromethylation byproduct 4aa is suppressed by lowering CF3SO2Na to 2.0 equiv and increasing H2O:MeCN ratio. The sulfonylation variant is proposed to follow an analogous pathway with ArSO2 radical instead of CF3 radical (no SO2 extrusion).
